narrative:
Henry County has 18,805 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.7% of registrants.
